description: State account of some kind, headed "72 ghulāms(?)... for each of them in a day...," and underneath entries such as "1/6 + 1/8 irdabb." On verso there is a difficult name (ʿAlī b. كمر(؟) الحوىل(؟) al-Khurāsāniyayn(?)). Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
